description.ko: 신비로운 심해 생명체가 남긴 생체 발광 흔적이 바다의 고요하고 어두운 미드나잇 존을 밝힙니다.
description.en: A bioluminescent trail left by a mysterious deep-sea entity, illuminating the silent and dark midnight zone of the ocean.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Aurora.' A long, serpentine bioluminescent creature composed of #40E0D0 turquoise light drifts through the #000080 midnight water, leaving a trail of #48D1CC cyan glowing particles. In the background, #006994 blue hydrothermal vents release shimmering marine snow that catches the creature's light. Photorealistic fluid dynamics and volumetric light rays filter through the high-pressure abyss. Focus on the transparent, ethereal glow of the deep-sea life against the absolute darkness. 8k resolution, hyper-realistic underwater atmosphere.
